summary: Improved trajectory after Anirvium AI optimization recommendations.

trajectory.output_summary: Classified as critical enterprise outage with SLA breach and churn risk.
Retrieved outage, enterprise SLA, evidence citation, and tone policies.
Applied enterprise SLA escalation policy and kept action approval-aware.
Assigned engineering incident response and customer success owner.
trajectory.owner: Engineering Incident Commander with Mina Rao

trajectory.output_summary: Drafted safe, grounded customer response with owner and next action.
trajectory.draft_response: Hi ACME Corp team, we understand the urgency of the production outage and SLA risk. We are routing this to Engineering incident response + Customer Success with Engineering Incident Commander and Mina Rao assigned. We will verify affected region, impact scope, and incident timeline before the next update. Internal evidence: KB-001, KB-003, POL-003, POL-005, KB-006.
